name: Pusher Channels
description: Pusher Channels — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in Real time Messaging.

seo.title: Pusher Channels Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Pusher Channels analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in CI/CD for Applications.

review.verdict: Pusher Channels is a Real-time / WebSocket Infrastructure tool.
pros: Managed pub/sub infrastructure removes server ops burden
review.best_for: Apps with live features: chat, collaboration, gaming
review.not_for: Purely request-response apps with no real-time needs

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with free tier; no peak-lock evidence

lock_in.reason: Proprietary protocol, migration to SSE possible

developer_experience.reason: Excellent docs and SDKs across platforms
